options.name: -list_extra_pin_net
options.description: Generates list of nets which have extra pins in SPEF but not in Verilog

options.name: -list_nodriver_net
options.description: Lists one terminal nets that has no driver

options.name: -list_noload_net
options.description: Lists one terminal nets that have no load

options.name: -list_zero_cap_net
options.description: Generates list of zero capacitance nets

options.name: -max_missing
options.description: Limits the no. of missing annotations to the number specified

options.name: -net_file
options.description: Input to this parameter is the valid file name containing list of net names for which annotation summary is required. Net names in file can be specified as one net per line.

options.name: -nets
options.description: specify the list of net names for which annotation summary is required

options.name: -view
options.description: reports back annotated parasitics for the specified analysis view (string, optional) > {write_fileName} # writes the report to the filename (redirect_operator, optional) >> {append_fileName} # appends the report to the fileName
